---
title: "CLOGLOG_LINK"
generated: true
description: "The complementary log-log link :math:`g( mu) =  log(- log(1 -  mu))`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:CLOGLOG_LINK -->
```python
CLOGLOG_LINK = Link(name='cloglog', link=_cloglog_link, linkinv=_cloglog_linkinv, mu_eta=_cloglog_mu_eta, eta_bound=_ETA_MAX)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:CLOGLOG_LINK -->
The complementary log-log link $g(\mu) = \log(-\log(1 - \mu))$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
